name: Brendan Schaub
blurb: He hosts The Fighter and the Kid podcast with Bryan Callen and other shows, and turned to stand-up comedy in 2015.
bio: Brendan Schaub is an American podcast host, stand-up comedian, and former professional mixed martial artist who fought in the UFC before retiring in 2015. He hosts The Fighter and the Kid podcast with Bryan Callen and other shows, and turned to stand-up comedy in 2015. He has released the specials Youd Be Surprised (2019) and The Gringo Papi (2022).

timeline.ev: Signs with the UFC after The Ultimate Fighter
Co-founds The Fighter and the Kid podcast
Releases debut special Youd Be Surprised on Showtime

bits.yt_title: Leaving Neverland | Brendan Schaub | Stand Up Comedy
